/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/armor_interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/armor_info__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/armor_interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/serial_driver__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/armor_interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/joint_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/armor_interfaces/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/serial_receive_data__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
